name: Roletopia Game Code
description: Core game engine, role system, and networking components for Roletopia
author: fastnick21

files.name: core-engine.dll
files.description: Main game logic engine - handles game flow, voting, task completion, and win conditions

files.name: role-system.dll
files.description: Role behavior and abilities system - defines how each role functions in the game

files.name: networking.dll
files.description: Server-client communication module - handles data sync between host and vanilla players
